# polydock

Nix package definition for `polydock` (folke/polydock), a GTK3 taskbar app built with GJS. Uses `pnpm2nix-nzbr` to handle pnpm-based JS dependencies inside a Nix derivation.

## Contents

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| [default.nix](./default.nix) | Fetches `pnpm2nix` from `nzbr/pnpm2nix-nzbr`, calls `mkPnpmPackage` with GTK/GJS native deps to produce `polydock` binary. |

## Stack

- **Build helper:** `pnpm2nix` (rev `1f56072` from `nzbr/pnpm2nix-nzbr`)
- **Entry point:** `mkPnpmPackage` (via `callPackage` on `derivation.nix` inside pnpm2nix)
- **pname:** `polydock` | **version:** `master-2023-10-06` | **src rev:** `d635052`

## Dependencies

| Kind | Packages |
|------|----------|
| `nativeBuildInputs` | `nodejs.pkgs.pnpm`, `wrapGAppsHook`, `gobject-introspection` |
| `buildInputs` | `gjs`, `gtk3-x11`, `libwnck`, `gdk-pixbuf` |

## File Relationships

`default.nix` is self-contained. `pnpm2nix` fetched inline via `fetchFromGitHub`; no shared lib or overlay wiring needed beyond standard `pkgs` argument. Consumed by root [overlay.nix](../../overlay.nix) alongside sibling packages under `pkgs/`.
